text: AWS Control Tower - Landing Zone @ stsncio @ o » Well Architected multi-account environment - Home Region e .. built with AWS Organizations, AWS Config, CloudFormation e Security OU - Log Archive & Audit Accounts (CloudTrail & Config Logs) e Sandbox OU - Test/less rigid security * You can create other OU's and Accounts ¢ |AM Identity Center (AWS SSO) - SSO, multiple-accounts, ID Federation * Monitoring and Notifications - CloudWatch and SNS * End User account provisioning via Service Catalog
